allow: Bash(sqlite3 pgadmin4.db "SELECT s.name, s.host, s.port, s.username FROM server s LIMIT 10;")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432 | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$proc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter 'ProcessId=5948'
\\$proc | Select-Object Name, ExecutablePath, CommandLine
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique
foreach\(\\$pid in \\$pids\) { 
  Write-Host \\"Arrêt PID: \\$pid\\"
  Stop-Process -Id \\$pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 
}
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$procs = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique
foreach\(\\$p in \\$procs\) { Write-Host \\"Arrêt: \\$p\\"; Stop-Process -Id \\$p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess" 2>&1)
